site.name: Given Free Rein
site.description: It's not just about horses. It's about people, place, and the history shared between them. Here, I share stories from across the globe — where horse culture is alive and thriving, ancient and evolving.
site.author: Alex Maurer
site.author_bio: From the showjumping arenas of Malaysia and Germany to the paddocks of Australia, horses have shaped every chapter of my life. What began as a childhood passion has become a lifelong journey — training, competing, and working alongside these remarkable animals across the world.

newsletter.title: Join The Ride
newsletter.description: Subscribe to Given Free Rein for stories celebrating the art, people, and culture of the horse world.
